title: Progress Bar

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Progress Bar
body: Create a progress bar that displays a dynamic percentage, updates the progress bar's width when the percentage changes, and accepts user input to change the percentage.
requirements
1. The progress bar should display a percentage value (e.g., 20%, 50%, 80%)
2. The progress bar's width should update dynamically based on the percentage
3. Users should be able to input a percentage value (between 0-100) and update the progress bar
4. The progress bar should validate user input (only accept values between 0-100)
5. The progress bar should handle invalid user input cases (e.g., decimal values, negative values, values outside the 0-100 range)

constraints: Returns a random percentage between 0 and 100
